title: Briefing Forge
public_claim: Briefing Forge is a MuranoOS room handoff for turning research output into live executive briefings.
distinctive_mechanism: It routes research material through source grounding, audience need, judgment frame, uncertainty, dissent, BLUF, decision memo, and briefing format so briefing products remain tied to the evidence base.
